# Hossam Ali

> Hossam Ali is an HR and administration professional in Doha, Qatar, focused on HR operations, workforce analytics, reporting and practical process automation.

## Primary profiles
- [English profile](https://hossam-nassar.github.io/CV/en/)
- [Arabic profile](https://hossam-nassar.github.io/CV/ar/)

- [Workforce and Manpower Dashboard](https://hossam-nassar.github.io/CV/en/projects/workforce-dashboard.html)
